description.en: Route an expense request through a summarizing agent to an approver. If the approver does not decide within 48 hours the request escalates to a second role, and the final outcome is announced either way.
description.de: Leitet einen Spesenantrag über einen zusammenfassenden Agenten an eine Freigaberolle weiter. Entscheidet die Freigaberolle nicht innerhalb von 48 Stunden, eskaliert der Antrag an eine zweite Rolle; das Ergebnis wird in beiden Fällen verkündet.

steps.prompt: Summarize this expense request for an approver. Requester: {{ctx.requester}}. Amount: {{ctx.amount}}. Purpose: {{ctx.purpose}}. Keep it to three sentences and flag anything unusual.

human.message: An expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} needs your decision. Summary: {{steps.summarize.text}}
Escalation: the expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} was not decided within 48 hours. Please decide now. Summary: {{steps.summarize.text}}

steps.prompt: Announce the outcome of the expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} to the requester. State clearly whether it was approved or rejected and who decided.

description.en: Agent that condenses the incoming expense request for the approver.
description.de: Agent, der den eingehenden Spesenantrag für die Freigaberolle verdichtet.

description.en: Agent that announces the final decision to the requester.
description.de: Agent, der die finale Entscheidung an die antragstellende Person meldet.

description.en: Role whose holders decide the expense request.
description.de: Rolle, deren Mitglieder über den Spesenantrag entscheiden.

description.en: Role that decides when the approver misses the 48-hour deadline.
description.de: Rolle, die entscheidet, wenn die Freigaberolle die 48-Stunden-Frist verpasst.

description.en: Channel used to reach the approver and the escalation role.
description.de: Kanal, über den Freigabe- und Eskalationsrolle erreicht werden.
